title: Stop Writing Tone Instructions. Layer Them. - Isadora Martin-Dye, Isadora & Co
summary: Isadora Martin-Dye presents a four-layer architecture for brand voice in AI systems: immutable identity, situational mode, example-anchored voice, and deterministic post-generation veto. The approach ensures brand voice consistency across interactions and prevents prompt degradation over extended conversations.
writeup: Isadora Martin-Dye lays out a four-layer architecture for controlling brand voice in AI systems rather than packing tone into a single instruction block. The layers are an immutable identity, a situational mode, an example-anchored voice, and a deterministic post-generation veto that filters output after it is produced. The structure aims to hold voice consistent across interactions and to counter prompt degradation over long conversations. The post-generation veto is deterministic, separating final enforcement from the generative step.
